---
title: The Demo
format: 
    revealjs:
        theme: theme.scss
        margin: 0.04
        incremental: true  
        code-block-height: 250px
        menu: false
        slide-number: true
        revealjs-plugins:
          - chalkboard
---

{{< include slides/01-theory.md >}}
{{< include slides/02-code.md >}}
